headline: Cintas Gears Up to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: CTAS heads into Q4 results with expectations for revenue and earnings growth as customer retention, safety services and acquisitions remain in focus.

headline: Cintas Named to Selling Power Magazine’s 60 Best Companies to Sell For 2026 List
summary: CINCINNATI, July 13, 2026--This marks Cintas’ 21st consecutive year on the list.
